_notes.note_icy_touch_two_bits: Icy Touch(45477) has TWO mask0 bits set: bit1(2)+bit6(64)=0x42=66. Both bits appear unique to Icy Touch — no other queried DK spell has bit1 or bit6 in mask0. Full mask [66,0,0] used for accuracy.

_notes.note_black_ice: Black Ice increases Frost and Shadow DK spell damage. No confirmed shared DK frost-or-shadow bit exists. All-ones used — accepted scope for Frost spec affix.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Icy Touch
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[66,0,0]=0x00000042. IcyTouch(45477) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. mask0 bit1(2)+bit6(64)=66. Both bits unique to Icy Touch. Mirrors main-file id=60 (spec_tree=-1, corrected to [66,0,0]) but scoped to Frost spec. Icy Touch damage +5%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 5). WotLK: 3r at +5/+10/+15%.

talent_affixes.name: Black Ice
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — Black Ice increases Frost and Shadow DK spell damage, but no confirmed shared DK frost-or-shadow bit exists. All-ones accepted scope for Frost spec affix. Carrier IcyTouch(45477) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. All DK spell damage +2%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 2). WotLK: 5r at +2/+4/+6/+8/+10%.
